items.claim: Max Holloway is 34 years old and potentially entering a phase of physical decline.
items.quote: the big question is at 34 years old, is this going to be the moment where we start to see that decline?

items.claim: Max Holloway lacked a viable Plan B or tactical adjustment when outclassed in his fight against Charles Oliveira.
items.quote: it certainly just looked like when you mentioned outclass that he was outclassed in that fight and that he just didn't have a very good plan B to go to.

items.claim: Max Holloway's natural walking weight is approximately 170-175 pounds, making him a small welterweight.
items.quote: I think he only walks around 170 175 like he is not a a huge um lightweight

items.claim: Max Holloway has accumulated significant physical damage throughout his career due to his involvement in many wars.
items.quote: he has taken a ton of damage. He's been in a lot of wars.

items.claim: Max Holloway's high volume of fights (33 UFC appearances) may be detrimental to his current performance compared to less active fighters.
items.quote: you can almost go the back end with him like maybe it's to the detriment of Max Holloway that he's had that many

items.claim: Conor McGregor's power is expected to carry up to the 170-pound weight class.
items.quote: He probably his power is going to carry a 170.
